title: polyscias simabifolia
intro: Polyscias simabifolia, also known as the Siam Ruby, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polyscias simabifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Polyscias simabifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
